Intraday post (09/March)

Weekly post:

Forecasts are coming true | Weekly post (09-13/March)

I spent the past two weeks to explain agin Iran and the oil-related risk for you both on Twitter and here as well. Also dropped a big summary of geopolitical situation for better clarity.

Personal note: Sorry for the late. We change clock later. And today, I simply forgot it. Tomorrow, post will come as usual.

Personal note: Sorry for the late. We change clock later. And today, I simply forgot it. Tomorrow, post will come as usual.

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

Speed profile is net negative and steeply so. 0DTEs are also trying to protect the downside.

Centroid is at 6600.80

Downside pivot is at 6562.80target is 6537.24Supportive range. 6580 is a local pin. Market expects to ‘grab’ any downside momentum at 6500/6490 at lowest in case of left-tail.

Upside pivot is at 6674.90target is 6741.19Upside target is reversionish, high probability. I would add 6760 as margin of error if vol catches up. 6690 is the local pin, until the pivot holds. Otherwise it’s 6615 and slowdown towards 6640/45
